prose:
The frontier orbital analysis for formaldehyde was completed using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level of theory in the gas phase.

The computed HOMO energy is -7.6523 eV and the LUMO energy is -1.7826 eV, resulting in a HOMO-LUMO gap of 5.8697 eV. The calculation converged in 8 SCF cycles. No warnings were reported.
